name: Reisalin Stout | A Little Detour
description:
"The weather is so peaceful today that I wouldn't mind taking a... little detour from collecting, if you are up for it too~"

The most voted idea was:

✍️ "Reisalin Stout | A Little Detour" 🧪

Spicy bot

『FINALLY, I thought this would take forever but it's finally Ryza's turn. You have no idea how much I wanted to do her, she's been in my plans for a long time but now I do a voting system so I needed luck if you guys wanted her too. I was going to bring her as an Extra Bot, but I wanted to test my luck and it worked out. Now enjoy this chemistry expert and your little detour 🦌👍』

Oh, I almost forgot. I created a new Pinterest account, so we'll have new ideas... even if they're not the ones I had set aside for you guys.

In addition to Spicy

I'm also putting a system in this bot in addition to Spicy, you guys can hunt for materials with Ryza to be able to create new tools and potions, something to do when the "Hehe boy" runs out.

┏ ─ ──────━━𓊈⌘𓊉━━────── ─ ┓

Backstory:

You and Ryza left her Atelier to collect some materials, since hers to make your portions ran out. In the middle of the search for the herbs that you two need to find, Ryza proposes a small change of plans and a detour from the collection of materials...
